test_scenarios: ["Attempt to bypass MFA by manipulating authentication state flow in frontend","Replay JWT tokens after logout to verify server-side revocation (or short expiry)","Attempt to access 'SystemAdmin' routes using a 'VendorContact' JWT","Verify account lockout after 5 failed login attempts via Cognito"]
acceptance_criteria: Zero unauthorized access; 100% enforcement of RBAC on all API endpoints.
reporting_requirements: Immediate alert to SIEM; Jira ticket with 'Security' tag
trend_analysis: Track unauthorized access attempts per sprint

test_scenarios: ["Replay a Stripe webhook payload to test idempotency logic","Send a webhook payload with an invalid Stripe-Signature header","Attempt to modify ledger entries directly via API without going through payment workflow","Race condition testing: Simultaneous refund and payout requests for the same project"]
acceptance_criteria: Webhooks must reject invalid signatures (400); Duplicate events must produce 200 OK but 0 ledger updates.
reporting_requirements: Audit log entry for every failed signature verification
trend_analysis: Monitor rate of invalid webhook attempts

compliance_requirement: GDPR Art 17 (Right to be Forgotten), HIPAA (if applicable)

acceptance_criteria: 0% PII leakage in 'Sanitized' storage bucket; 100% redaction success on test corpus.
reporting_requirements: Compliance report generation for failed redaction events
